name: @onlinechefgroep/pi-agent-orchestrator
tagline: Multi-agent orchestration for Pi: autonomous subagents, worktrees, swarms, schedules, handoffs, prompt compression, and live TUI observability.

coreCapabilities.title: Interactive TUI dashboard
coreCapabilities.description: agent list, resource top, daemon schedules, performance metrics, help, and settings.

coreCapabilities.title: Subagent lifecycle
coreCapabilities.description: spawn, queue, steer, stop, inspect, and collect structured results.

coreCapabilities.title: Permission inheritance
coreCapabilities.description: children cannot silently regain tools or scopes removed by a parent.

coreCapabilities.title: Worktree isolation
coreCapabilities.description: optional branch and filesystem isolation for implementation agents.

coreCapabilities.title: Prompt compression profiles
coreCapabilities.description: static system-prompt guidance with global defaults and per-agent overrides; this does not compact conversation history.

coreCapabilities.title: Persistent scheduling
coreCapabilities.description: cron, interval, and one-shot jobs with a daemon schedule view.

coreCapabilities.title: Structured handoffs
coreCapabilities.description: machine-readable transfer between agents and chained workflows.

coreCapabilities.title: Cross-extension RPC
coreCapabilities.description: capability-based integration for trusted peer extensions.

agentTypes.Use when: Parallel codebase discovery and evidence collection
Architecture and implementation planning before edits
Sandboxed data or compute through optional `@onlinechef/context-mode`

compressionLevels.Current behavior: Most verbose read-only and handoff guidance
compressionLevels.Recommended use: Smaller or less instruction-reliable models; debugging instruction-following failures; rich structured handoffs

compressionLevels.Current behavior: Concise guidance while retaining examples and field descriptions
Short read-only guidance and a minimal handoff schema
compressionLevels.Recommended use: Short, low-risk tasks with strong models where small prompt savings matter more than protocol detail

architectureAscii:
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    pi-coding-agent host                     │
│  (loads this extension, provides ExtensionAPI + AgentMgr)   │
└────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────┘
                     │
        ┌────────────┴────────────┐
        │    Extension Entry      │
        │    src/index.ts         │
        │  - registerCommands()   │
        │  - initSubagents()      │
        └────────────┬────────────┘
                     │
        ┌────────────┴────────────┐
        │     Agent Registry      │
        │   src/agent-registry.ts │
        │  - load default agents    │
        │  - load custom agents     │
        │  - settings getters       │
        └────────────┬────────────┘
                     │
        ┌────────────┴────────────┐
        │      Agent Types        │
        │   src/agent-types.ts    │
        │  - builtinToolNames     │
        │  - PermissionUtils      │
        │  - partition filtering  │
        └────────────┬────────────┘
                     │
        ┌────────────┴────────────┐
        │      Agent Runner       │
        │   src/agent-runner.ts   │
        │  - createSubagent()     │
        │  - runAgent()           │
        │  - compaction logic     │
        │  - permission inherit   │
        └────────────┬────────────┘
                     │
    ┌────────────────┼────────────────┐
    │                │                │
┌───┴────┐    ┌─────┴──────┐  ┌─────┴────────┐
│ Hooks  │    │  Context   │  │   Handoff    │
│hooks.ts│    │ context.ts │  │  handoff.ts  │
└────────┘    └────────────┘  └──────────────┘
    │                │                │
    └────────────────┴────────────────┘
                     │
        ┌────────────┴────────────┐
        │         Usage           │
        │     src/usage.ts        │
        │  - token tracking       │
        │  - session context %    │
        └────────────┬────────────┘
                     │
        ┌────────────┴────────────┐
        │     Output Handler      │
        │  src/output-handler.ts  │
        │  - /agents menu         │
        │  - settings UI          │
        │  - conversation viewer  │
        └────────────┬────────────┘
                     │
         ┌───────────┴───────────┐
         │                       │
   ┌─────┴──────┐        ┌──────┴──────┐
   │   Agent    │        │  Schedule   │

   │dashboard.ts│        │menu.ts      │
